## Package description

A collection of datasets, originally for the book [Computational
Actuarial Science with
R](https://www.routledge.com/Computational-Actuarial-Science-with-R/Charpentier/p/book/9781138033788)
edited by Arthur Charpentier. Now, the package contains a large variety
of actuarial datasets for students, teachers and researchers.

This package cannot be hosted on [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/)
because the installed size is too big: 259.7Mb.

We strongly encourage users to visit the [R project
website](https://www.r-project.org/) and take a look at the CRAN task
view on [Actuarial
science](https://CRAN.R-project.org/view=ActuarialScience) proposed by
[Dutang & Goulet
(2026)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/view=ActuarialScience).

## Topics (MSC 2010)

- [actuarial
  science](https://mathscinet.ams.org/mathscinet/msc/msc2010.html?t=62P05)
- [insurance](https://mathscinet.ams.org/mathscinet/msc/msc2010.html?t=97M30)
- [risk](https://mathscinet.ams.org/mathscinet/msc/msc2010.html?t=91B30)

## Install

Please make sure that [xts](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=xts),
[zoo](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=zoo) packages are installed.

To get the current released version please visit one of the three
servers

- [CNRS](http://dutangc.perso.math.cnrs.fr/RRepository/),
- [freakonometrics](https://freakonometrics.github.io/CASdatasets/),
- [UQAM](https://cas.uqam.ca/),
- [free website](http://dutangc.free.fr/pub/RRepos/).

Alternatively, you can use

``` r

install.packages("CASdatasets", repos = "http://dutangc.free.fr/pub/RRepos/pub/", type="source")
#or 
install.packages("CASdatasets", repos = "https://dutangc.perso.math.cnrs.fr/RRepository/pub/", type="source")
#or 
install.packages("CASdatasets", repos = "https://cas.uqam.ca/pub/", type="source")
library(CASdatasets)
```

To get the current development version from github, you may use

``` r

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("dutangc/CASdatasets")
library(CASdatasets)
```

## Authors and contact

Issues can be reported on
<https://github.com/dutangc/CASdatasets/issues>.

- [Arthur Charpentier](https://freakonometrics.github.io/):
  charpentier.arthur\<\<@))uqam.ca
- [Christophe Dutang](http://dutangc.free.fr/): dutangc\<\<@))gmail.com

Authors gratefully acknowledge the following contributors: Julien
Siharath and [Ewen Gallic](https://egallic.fr/).

## How to contribute?

If you to contribute, please contact us. We will help you in the
anonymizing process so that neither policyholders nor the insurer can be
identified.

## Citation

If you use `CASdatasets`, you should cite:  
Christophe Dutang and Arthur Charpentier (2026). *CASdatasets: Insurance
datasets*, R package version 1.2-1, DOI
[10.57745/P0KHAG](https://doi.org/10.57745/P0KHAG).

# Package index

## Overview

Overview of datasets available in `CASdatasets`. You can access them by
typing `data(<datasetname>)`.

- [`CASdatasets`](1overview.md) [`casdatasets`](1overview.md) :
  CASdatasets package

## Australia

Australian datasets

- [`ausautoBI8999`](ausautoBI.md) : Automobile bodily injury claim
  dataset in Australia
- [`auscathist`](auscathist.md) : Australian catastrophe historic
- [`ausprivautolong`](ausprivauto.md) [`ausMTPL8486`](ausprivauto.md)
  [`ausprivauto0405`](ausprivauto.md) : Automobile claim datasets in
  Australia
- [`ausNLHYCapAdeq`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYFinPerf`](ausNLHYtotal.md) [`ausNLHYFinPos`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYLiability`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYOffProf`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYOpIncExp`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYPremClaim`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYPrivInsur`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYPubInsur`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYRecAASB`](ausNLHYtotal.md)
  [`ausNLHYReserve`](ausNLHYtotal.md) : Australian Market - non-life
  insurance (aggregate level)
- [`ausNLHYClaimByState`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYPremByState`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYCapAdeqByComp`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYFinPerfByComp`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYFinPosByComp`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYPrivInsur`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYFinPerfPublic`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYFinPosPublic`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYOpIncExpPublic`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYPremClaimPublic`](ausNLHYby.md)
  [`ausNLHYPubInsur`](ausNLHYby.md) : Australian Market - non-life
  insurance (company, state, public level)
- [`ausNLHYglossary`](ausNLHYglossary.md) : Australian Market - non-life
  insurance (Glossary)
- [`ausNLHYLloydAsset`](ausNLHYlloyds.md)
  [`ausNLHYLloydGPI`](ausNLHYlloyds.md)
  [`ausNLHYLloydUWAcc`](ausNLHYlloyds.md)
  [`ausNLHYLloydUWRes`](ausNLHYlloyds.md) : Australian Market - non-life
  insurance (LLoyds insurance business)
- [`ausNSWdriver04`](ausNSW.md) [`ausNSWdeath02`](ausNSW.md) :
  Australian Statistics - New South Wales in 2004
- [`austri1autoBI7895`](austriLob.md) [`austri2auto`](austriLob.md) :
  Australian private motor triangles

## Belgium

Belgian datasets

- [`beaonre`](beaonre.md) : AON Re Belgian dataset
- [`beMTPL16`](beMTPL16.md) : Belgian motor third-part liability dataset
- [`beMTPL97`](beMTPL97.md) : a Belgian motor third-part liability
  dataset
- [`besecura`](besecura.md) : Secura Re Belgian dataset

## Brazil

Brazilian datasets

- [`braggclaim`](braggclaimprem.md) [`braggprem`](braggclaimprem.md) :
  Descriptive statistics of aggregate claims and premiums for the 41
  Brazilian regions
- [`brautocoll`](brautocoll.md) : Brazilian Automobile Collision Claims
- [`brgeomunicins`](brgeomunicins.md) : Brazilian geospatial dataset for
  municipalities
- [`brvehins1a`](brvehins.md) [`brvehins1b`](brvehins.md)
  [`brvehins1c`](brvehins.md) [`brvehins1d`](brvehins.md)
  [`brvehins1e`](brvehins.md) [`brvehins2a`](brvehins.md)
  [`brvehins2b`](brvehins.md) [`brvehins2c`](brvehins.md)
  [`brvehins2d`](brvehins.md) : Two Brazilian datasets for vehicle
  insurance

## Canada

Canadian datasets

- [`canlifins`](canlifins.md) [`canlifins2`](canlifins.md) : Canadian
  life insurance
- [`catelematic13`](catelematic13.md) : Canadian telematic insurance
  dataset

## Danemark

Danish datasets

- [`danishuni`](danish.md) [`danishmulti`](danish.md) : Danish
  reinsurance claim dataset

## European Union

European datasets

- [`ECBYieldCurve`](ECBYieldCurve.md) : Yield curve data spot rate,
  AAA-rated bonds, maturities from 3 months to 30 years
- [`eutelematic13`](eutelematic13.md) : European telematic insurance
  dataset
- [`eudirectlapse`](eudirectlapse.md) : European lapse dataset from the
  direct channel
- [`euhealthinsurance`](euhealthinsurance.md) : European health
  insurance
- [`euMTPL`](euMTPL.md) : European motor TPL insurance
- [`eusavingULnoPSperYr`](eusavingsurrender.md)
  [`eusavingULnoPSperQtr`](eusavingsurrender.md)
  [`eusavingULnoPSperMth`](eusavingsurrender.md)
  [`eusavingULnoPS`](eusavingsurrender.md) : European surrender dataset
  from the direct channel
- [`spacedata`](spacedata.md) : Space dataset

## France

French datasets

- [`freaggnumber`](freaggnumber.md) : French aggregate claim numbers
- [`frePM6064`](fremorttables.md) [`frePF6064`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freTD7377`](fremorttables.md) [`freTV7377`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freTD8890`](fremorttables.md) [`freTV8890`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freTPRV93`](fremorttables.md) [`freTPG93full`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freTF0002`](fremorttables.md) [`freTH0002`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freAS0002`](fremorttables.md) [`freTGH05`](fremorttables.md)
  [`freTGF05`](fremorttables.md) [`freHMD`](fremorttables.md) : French
  Mortality Tables
- [`frebiloss`](frebiloss.md) : French business interruption losses
- [`freclaimset`](freclaimset.md) [`freclaimset2motor`](freclaimset.md)
  : Two datasets of French claim settlements
- [`freclaimset3fire9207`](freclaimset9207.md)
  [`freclaimset3dam9207`](freclaimset9207.md)
  [`freclaimset3multi9207`](freclaimset9207.md) : French individual
  claim settlements
- [`frecomfire`](frecomfire.md) : French commercial fire losses
- [`freprojqxINSEE`](freportfolio.md)
  [`frefictivetable`](freportfolio.md)
  [`frefictivetable2`](freportfolio.md)
  [`frefictivetable3`](freportfolio.md)
  [`freptfpermdis`](freportfolio.md) [`freptftempdis`](freportfolio.md)
  : Portfolio Mortality and Disability Tables
- [`freIRSA`](freIRSA.md) : French IRSA claim amount convention
- [`fremarine`](fremarine.md) : Some French marine losses
- [`fremotor1prem0304a`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1prem0304b`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1prem0304c`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1freq0304a`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1freq0304b`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1freq0304c`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1sev0304a`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1sev0304b`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor1sev0304c`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor2sev9907`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor3sev9907`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor4sev9907`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor2freq9907u`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor3freq9907u`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor4freq9907u`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor2freq9907b`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor3freq9907b`](fremotorclaim.md)
  [`fremotor4freq9907b`](fremotorclaim.md) : French claims for private
  motor
- [`freMPL1`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL1sub`](freMPL.md)
  [`freMPL2`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL3`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL4`](freMPL.md)
  [`freMPL5`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL6`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL7`](freMPL.md)
  [`freMPL8`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL9`](freMPL.md) [`freMPL10`](freMPL.md)
  : French Motor Personal Line datasets
- [`freMTPLfreq`](freMTPL.md) [`freMTPLsev`](freMTPL.md)
  [`freMTPL2freq`](freMTPL.md) [`freMTPL2sev`](freMTPL.md) : French
  Motor Third-Part Liability datasets
- [`freP2Pdis10`](fredistables.md) [`freT2Tdis10`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Pdis10`](fredistables.md) [`freP2Pdisprob10`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Tdisprob10`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Pdisprob10`](fredistables.md) [`freT2Ddis10`](fredistables.md)
  [`freP2Ddis10`](fredistables.md) [`freT2Ddisprob10`](fredistables.md)
  [`freP2Ddisprob10`](fredistables.md) [`freP2Pdis13`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Tdis13`](fredistables.md) [`freT2Pdis13`](fredistables.md)
  [`freP2Pdisprob13`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Tdisprob13`](fredistables.md)
  [`freT2Pdisprob13`](fredistables.md) : French Disability Tables and
  Probabilities
- [`freRegion7526`](freDemography.md)
  [`freRegionOld7526`](freDemography.md) : Some datasets relative to the
  French demography
- [`fretelematic`](fretelematic.md) : A French telematic dataset
- [`fretplclaimnumber`](fretplclaimnumber.md) : TPL claim number dataset
- [`fretri1auto9605`](fre4triLob.md) [`fretri2auto9605`](fre4triLob.md)
  [`fretri3auto9605`](fre4triLob.md) [`fretri4auto9403`](fre4triLob.md)
  [`fretri1TPL9207`](fre4triLob.md) [`fretri1dis1418`](fre4triLob.md) :
  French private motor, third party liability or disability triangles
- [`pg15training`](pricingame.md) [`pg15pricing`](pricingame.md)
  [`pg16trainpol`](pricingame.md) [`pg16trainclaim`](pricingame.md)
  [`pg16test`](pricingame.md) [`pg17trainpol`](pricingame.md)
  [`pg17trainclaim`](pricingame.md) [`pg17testyear1`](pricingame.md)
  [`pg17testyear2`](pricingame.md) [`pg17testyear3`](pricingame.md)
  [`pg17testyear4`](pricingame.md) : French Motor Third-Part Liability
  datasets used for 100 percent Data Science game

## Norway

Norwegian datasets

- [`norauto`](norauto.md) : Norwegian fire insurance dataset
- [`Norberg`](Norberg.md) : Ragnar Norberg's credibility dataset
- [`norfire`](norfire.md) : Norwegian fire insurance dataset
- [`nortritpl8800`](nortritpl.md) : Australian liabilty insurance
  triangles
- [`nzcathist`](nzcathist.md) : New Zealand catastrophe historic

## Singapore

Singaporian datasets

- [`sgautoprop9701`](sgtriangles.md) [`sgautoBI9301`](sgtriangles.md) :
  Singapore general liability triangles
- [`sgautonb`](sgautonb.md) : Singapore Automobile claim count dataset

## Sweden

Swedish datasets

- [`swautoins`](swautoins.md) : Swedish Motor Insurance dataset
- [`swbusscase`](swbuss.md) : Swedish Buss Insurance dataset
- [`swmotorcycle`](swmotorcycle.md) : Swedish Motorcycle Insurance
  dataset
- [`swtri1auto`](swtriangles.md) : Switzerland general liability
  triangles

## United Kingdom

UK datasets

- [`ukaggclaim`](ukaggclaim.md) : UK Car Insurance Claims for 1975
- [`ukautocoll`](ukautocoll.md) : UK Automobile Collision Claims

## United States

US datasets

- [`FedYieldCurve`](FedYieldCurve.md) : Federal Reserve interest rates
- [`forexUSUK`](forex.md) : Foreign exchange rate between USD and GBP
- [`hurricanehist`](hurricanehist.md) : Hurricane history: Per Storm
  Maximum Wind Speeds (North Atlantic)
- [`ICB1`](ICB.md) [`ICB2`](ICB.md) : Insurance Company Benchmark
- [`lossalae`](lossalae.md) [`lossalaefull`](lossalae.md) : General
  Liability Claims
- [`SOAGMI`](SOAGMI.md) : SOA Group Medical Insurance claim dataset
- [`usautoBI`](usautoBI.md) : Automobile bodily injury claim dataset
- [`usautotri9504`](usautotri.md) [`usreauto8700`](usautotri.md) : US
  Automobile triangles
- [`usexpense`](usexpense.md) : US expense dataset
- [`ushu17stormloss`](ushurricane.md)
  [`ushu17annualloss`](ushurricane.md)
  [`ushu17inflation`](ushurricane.md)
  [`ushu17population`](ushurricane.md) [`ushu18ICAT`](ushurricane.md)
  [`ushu18W`](ushurricane.md) [`ushu18NCEI`](ushurricane.md) :
  Normalized Hurricane Damages
- [`ushustormloss4980`](ushurricanesub.md) : Normalized Hurricane
  Damages in US between 1949 and 1980
- [`uslapseagent`](uslapseagent.md) : United States lapse dataset from
  tied-agent channel
- [`usmassBI`](usmassBI.md) [`usmassBI2`](usmassBI.md) : Massachusetts
  Automobile bodily injury claim datasets
- [`usmedclaim`](usmedclaim.md) : US Medical claim incremental triangles
- [`usMSHA1316`](usMSHA1316.md) : U.S. Mine Safety and Health
  Administration claim datasets
- [`usMVTA`](usMVTA.md) : Motor Vehicle Traffic Accident: A consolidated
  database of police-reported motor vehicle traffic accidents in the
  United States for actuarial applications
- [`usprivautoclaim`](usprivautoclaim.md) : US Private Auto Claims
- [`usquakeLR`](usearthquake.md) : California earthquake loss ratios
- [`usreGL8700`](usGLtriangles.md) [`usreGL8190`](usGLtriangles.md)
  [`ustri1fire`](usGLtriangles.md) [`ustri2GL`](usGLtriangles.md) : US
  general liability triangles
- [`ustermlife`](ustermlife.md) : US Term Life insurance
- [`uswarrantaggnum`](uswarrantaggnum.md) : Warranty Automobile claims
- [`usworkcomp`](usworkerscomp.md) : US workers compensation datasets

## Misc.

Other datasets

- [`asiacomrisk`](asiacomrisk.md) : Large commercial risks in
  Asia-Pacific
- [`credit`](credit.md) : German Credit dataset
- [`Davis`](Davis.md) : Davis dataset
- [`eqlist`](eqlist.md) : Earthquake list
- [`itamtplcost`](itamtplcost.md) : Italian MTPL cost
- [`linearmodelfactor`](linearmodelfactor.md) : A simulated with linear
  model factor
- [`PnCdemand`](PnCdemand.md) : Property and casualty insurance demand

  dataset](poisson_vignette.md):

  dataset](quasi_poisson_vignette_ausprivauto0405.md):

  dataset](gam_rc_belgian_vignette.md):

  dataset](zero_inflated_vignette.md):
- [Frequency analysis with a Zero Inflated Regression of a French Motor
  Third Party Liability dataset](zero_inflated_vignette_freMTPL.md):
- [Calibration Metrics for Random Forest and Generalized Linear Model
  Using French Insurance Data](calibration_metrics_vignette.md):

  dataset](triangle_vignette.md):

  Data](triangle_aids_vignette.md):
